summary: Full e2e testing of MotoProf motorcycle parts e-commerce app. All 18 backend tests pass. Found and fixed critical auth cookie bug (secure=False on HTTPS). All major frontend flows verified working.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps content on mobile - minor cosmetic issue

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Cookies were set with secure=False on HTTPS site - changed to secure=True, samesite=none. This was preventing login sessions from persisting in the browser.
seed_products() only seeds if count == 0 - idempotent and correct
seed_admin() updates password if changed - correct behavior
CORS is configured correctly with explicit FRONTEND_URL and credentials:true
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - changed cookie secure=True, samesite=none for all 3 set_cookie calls
seed_data_creation: 25 demo products seeded at startup. Admin user auto-created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cookie auth bug was fixed (secure=False->True, samesite=lax->none). All flows tested: homepage hero+slider, brand/model search, category listing with filters, product detail with breadcrumb+price+cart, cart with quantity controls, unauthenticated checkout redirect to /giris?redirect=/odeme, authenticated checkout page loads. Backend 18/18 tests pass. Mobile hamburger menu visible.

rca_of_issue.bug: Login API returned 200 but session not persisted in browser
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Backend set httpOnly cookies with secure=False and samesite=lax. On HTTPS, modern browsers (Chrome/Firefox) require secure=True for cookies to be set/sent. The cookie was silently dropped.
rca_of_issue.fix: Changed all set_cookie calls to secure=True, samesite=none in /app/backend/server.py
